description: User scrolls down the page to view more of the summary and individual responses.
page_title: What other types of withdrawal methods would be desirable?
frame_description: The user is viewing the results for the question about desirable withdrawal methods. They scroll down past the summary text.

description: User pauses with the cursor over the sidebar before selecting a new question.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the left sidebar containing the list of survey questions.

description: User clicks on the sidebar item: 'Being able to easily see my monthly or yearly total Askable earnings is beneficial to me.'
interaction_target: Sidebar item: Being able to easily see...
page_title: What other types of withdrawal methods would be desirable?
frame_description: The user activates a different question from the sidebar to view its specific results.

description: The page content updates to show results for the newly selected question.
page_title: Being able to easily see my monthly or yearly total Askable earnings is beneficial to me.
frame_description: The main content area refreshes, displaying a summary and a bar chart for the new question.

description: User scrolls down to view the bar chart and individual responses for the current question.
page_title: Being able to easily see my monthly or yearly total Askable earnings is beneficial to me.
frame_description: The user scrolls down the page, bringing the 'Individual responses' section into view.

description: User hovers over the 'Hide filter' icon in the top right of the Filters pane.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the funnel icon with an 'x' in the Filters sidebar.

description: User clicks the 'Hide filter' icon to collapse the Filters pane.
frame_description: The user clicks the icon, triggering the sidebar to close.

description: The Filters pane collapses and disappears from the right side of the screen.
frame_description: The right-hand sidebar containing filters slides out of view, expanding the main content area.

description: User hovers over the 'Show filter' icon that replaced the previous filter pane.
frame_description: The cursor stays near the top right where the filter controls are located.

description: User pauses before selecting the next question from the sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor moves back to the left sidebar as the user considers the next question.

description: User clicks on the sidebar item: 'What other apps do you use that have a wallet or balance you can withdraw from?'
frame_description: The user selects the final question in the list.

description: The page content updates to show results for the 'What other apps...' question.
page_title: What other apps do you use that have a wallet or balance you can withdraw from?
frame_description: The main content area refreshes with a new summary and list of individual responses.

description: User repeatedly clicks and drags to highlight various terms and sentences in the summary text while reading.
frame_description: The user highlights words like 'cashback/rewards', 'apps', 'wallets', and 'banking' as they read through the AI-generated summary.

description: User scrolls down to the bottom of the page to see the full list of individual responses.
frame_description: The user scrolls past the summary to reach the table of individual participant answers.

description: User clicks the '+10 more' button at the bottom of the individual responses list.
frame_description: The user activates the button to load more responses in the table.

description: The list of individual responses expands to show additional entries.
frame_description: The table grows vertically as ten more participant responses are rendered.

description: User scrolls back up to the top of the page.
frame_description: The user scrolls upward, returning to the summary section of the page.
